# teams app manifest upload

Upload a manifest.json to update an existing Teams app

## Usage

```
teams app manifest upload [appId] [file-path]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `appId` | App ID | No |
| `file-path` | Path to manifest.json file | No |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
